title: Convention-based project directories
description: Replace role-based routing and global fallback with convention-based project/ and project-local/ directories. Discovery is recursive downward, optional .taskulus dotfile adds extra paths. No YAML storage format change.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Role detection, global fallback, and redirect system removed. project/ and project-local/ discovery works with optional .taskulus. create/promote/localize/init/list/ready updated. Specs updated with parity.
